reference: Hi, I have been coughing up a lot of phlegm, and it tastes foul and has a bad smell to it. It is very thick as well. It is really painful when I cough, and I have been sleeping a lot over the past few days. I have a few health problems and I am taking a lot of pain relief; I also have asthma. I have never been this tired before and have no energy. I keep getting breathless too.
text: Hi, I have been coughing up a lot of phlegm, and it tastes foul and has a bad smell to it. It is very thick as well. It is really painful when I cough, and I have been sleeping a lot over the past few days. I have a few health problems, and I am taking a lot of pain relievers. I also have asthma. I have never been this tired before, and have no energy. Stress is too.
